results.title: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC Has $8 Million Stake in Equinix, Inc. $EQIX
results.description: Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC decreased its position in shares of Equinix, Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX – Free Report) by 5.2% in the fourth quarter, Holdings Channel reports. The fund owned 10,437 shares of the financial services provider’s stock after selling 573 shares during the period. Vanguard Personalized Indexing Management LLC’s holdings in Equinix were worth $7,996,000 [...]

results.title: ‘I want more’: New Ballymena United recruit outlines Showgrounds ambitions after agreeing summer switch
results.description: Former Northern Ireland Under-21s international Micheál Glynn has outlined his trophy ambitions after agreeing to join Ballymena United following the expiry of his Cliftonville contract.

results.title: UFC event in Baku attracts ticket purchases from 67 countries worldwide
MML Investors Services LLC Boosts Stock Holdings in Union Pacific Corporation $UNP
results.description: MML Investors Services LLC raised its holdings in shares of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE:UNP – Free Report) by 1.6% during the fourth quarter, HoldingsChannel reports. The firm owned 182,965 shares of the railroad operator’s stock after purchasing an additional 2,958 shares during the period. MML Investors Services LLC’s holdings in Union Pacific were worth $42,323,000 [...]
